== History ==

== Timeline ==
{{TDRight
|name1=2013
|name2=2014}}
{{TDRight|tab}}<!--2014-->
* February 9, '''Counter Counter Clockwise''' reforms. '''[[MikeyR]]''', '''[[Mowarth]]''', '''[[Tiridus]]''' and '''[[Niko3333]]''' join.<ref>[https://www.facebook.com/CCClockwise/posts/583509798391173 Counter Counter Clockwise' Facebook Post] ''facebook.com''</ref>
* April 13, '''[[Sa1na]]''' joins.<ref>[https://www.facebook.com/CCClockwise/posts/615957661813053 Counter Counter Clockwise' Facebook Post] ''facebook.com''</ref>
* May 9, roster is acquired by [[Tricked eSport]]. [[MikeyR]], [[Mowarth]], [[Tiridus]], [[Sa1na]] and [[Niko3333]] leave.<ref>[http://tricked.dk/news/2525/counter-counter-tricked.aspx Counter Counter Tricked] ''tricked.dk''</ref>
{{TDRight|tab}}<!--2013-->
* July 11, owners of [[RGESC]] disbands the organization and [[RGESC EUNE]] will play with their former name '''Counter Counter Clockwise'''.<ref>[https://www.facebook.com/CCClockwise/posts/480827831992704 Counter Counter Clockwise Facebook Post] ''facebook.com''</ref>
* September 18, roster is acquired by [[RoughNeX]].
{{TDRight/end}}
